about.title: About Me
about.paragraph1: I'm a Software Engineer based in Caracas, Venezuela, passionate about building elegant solutions to complex problems.
about.paragraph2: With a strong foundation in computer science and a keen eye for detail, I specialize in developing scalable web applications using modern technologies.
about.paragraph3: I believe in writing code that reads like prose — clean, intentional, and maintainable. Every project is an opportunity to push the boundaries of what's possible.

portfolio.title: Personal Portfolio
portfolio.description: A modern, responsive portfolio website built with Next.js, TypeScript, and HeroUI. Features i18n, dark mode, and smooth section transitions.

ecommerce.title: E-Commerce Platform
ecommerce.description: Full-stack e-commerce solution with product management, shopping cart, payment processing, and order tracking.

apiGateway.title: API Gateway
apiGateway.description: High-performance API gateway built with Go, featuring rate limiting, authentication, load balancing, and service discovery.

seniorDev.description: Leading development of scalable web applications, mentoring junior developers, and architecting microservices solutions.

fullstackDev.description: Developed and maintained multiple client projects using modern web technologies, implementing CI/CD pipelines and automated testing.

juniorDev.description: Built responsive web interfaces and RESTful APIs, contributing to the core product used by thousands of users.
